description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Generate documentation that runs on push to main, on pull requests to main, and on workflow dispatch. Use a macos-14 job to check out the repository, set up dependencies, install awscli, doxygen, graphviz, and virtualenv. Then, build and generate documentation for C++, Slice, JavaScript, Python, and Swift. Finally, sync the generated documentation to S3 if the workflow runs on the main branch and is not a pull request.
